user_message: Just came out of consumption trend with VanArsdel Ltd. Turn this into my brief and pull out the asks.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Karen Patel <karen.patel@vanarsdelltd.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-24 13:30 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: VanArsdel Ltd consumption trend

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about consumption trend. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

---
From: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
To: Karen Patel <karen.patel@vanarsdelltd.com>
Date: 2024-02-02 15:31 EST
Subject: Re: Re: consumption trend Timeline

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with consumption trend. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

signals.detail: Signal detected for VanArsdel Ltd: the existing infrastructure won't support the target workload without upgrades

handoffs.condition: contact and opportunity records need updating

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF38-I trap (Stakeholder map delta misses authority shift); produces complete Stakeholder map delta, opportunity-at-risk assessment, re-engagement plan, contact update proposals,
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF38-I failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF38-I failure mode (Stakeholder map delta misses authority shift)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct consumption trend decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF38-I -- Stakeholder map delta misses authority shift
